title: Digital Marketer
responsibilities: launch and optimize multichannel campaigns; analyze funnel metrics and campaign performance; coordinate content, design, and sales stakeholders
requirements_text: We are looking for a junior specialist with hands-on experience in digital marketing, content strategy, seo, google analytics, campaign management. Strong communication and delivery ownership are expected.
benefits: Flexible schedule, paid vacation, learning budget, mentorship, and access to modern tooling.
summary: InsightFlow is hiring a junior digital marketer to support planning and executing acquisition, retention, and content campaigns.
raw_text: Vacancy V054: Digital Marketer at InsightFlow. Location: Warsaw. Employment: contract. Required experience: 0.7 years. Required skills: digital marketing, content strategy, seo, google analytics, campaign management, smm, copywriting, hubspot. Optional skills: market research, canva, landing pages. Responsibilities: launch and optimize multichannel campaigns; analyze funnel metrics and campaign performance; coordinate content, design, and sales stakeholders.
